ׂ╰┈➤「 ✦ Phantom Tales of the Night, also known as "Bakemono Yawazukushi" in Japanese, is a manga series created by Matsuri. It was first published in Monthly Comic Gene magazine by Media Factory from July 2016 to May 2019. Later, it was moved to the Comic Newtype website by Kadokawa Shoten in June 2019 and continued to be serialized there until November 2022. Currently, the series has been compiled into twelve volumes, with the latest volume released in July 2022. ✦ 」
